seoTitle: Campvale vs Canada Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Campvale and Canada Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Campvale vs Canada Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Campvale and Canada Bay.
heading: Campvale vs Canada Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Campvale, New South Wales and Canada Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Campvale has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Canada Bay (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Campvale or Canada Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Campvale has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Canada Bay scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Campvale scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Canada Bay scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Campvale or Canada Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Campvale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
